{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Solstice's tactic
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]] puts civilian fleets in active battlefields to tie the hands of opponents.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c30">''The Pilot'', chapter 30</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“Solstice put them there to tie our hands. Either we won’t fire on them and they can lock us up, or we do and they can call us murderers on the Subline.”<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c30" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
